2606.27780.title: Understanding Rollout Error in Graph World Models
2606.27780.paper_summary: World models are often used for planning by rolling learned dynamics forward. Many planning environments, however, are not vectors or images; they are graphs of agents, tools, skills, routes, and dependencies. In these settings, a local prediction error may stay local or spread through the graph, and the failure mode changes again when edges are predicted rather than fixed. This paper studies long-horizon rollout error in Graph World Models (GWMs). We formulate a unified fixed-edge and dynamic-edge GWM framework with action nodes for node-, edge-, and graph-level decisions. We develop graph-valued rollout bounds that separate topology-induced amplification from model-induced amplification, and we introduce a joint node-edge operator for dynamic-edge rollouts. Guided by the analysis, we propose Error-Aware GWM, which combines spectral regularization, rollout consistency, and critical-node weighting. Across synthetic topologies and heterogeneous agent-graph testbeds, rollout error and planning regret grow with horizon, dynamic-edge training is needed when structure evolves, and Error-Aware GWM prevents long-horizon divergence while preserving prediction accuracy. Real-world graph benchmarks clarify the scope of GWMs: they are most useful for dynamic graph rollout and agent planning, while specialized graph models remain strong on static or sparse prediction tasks.
2606.27780.paper_summary_zh: 世界模型常用於透過推進學習到的動態來進行規劃。然而，許多規劃環境並不是向量或圖像；它們是代理、工具、技能、路徑和依賴關係的圖。在這些環境中，本地預測誤差可能保持局部或在圖中擴散，當邊緣是預測而非固定時，失敗模式再次改變。本文研究圖世界模型（GWM）中的長期展開誤差。我們制定了一個統一的固定邊緣和動態邊緣 GWM 框架，並為節點、邊緣和圖層級決策引入行動節點。我們開發了圖值展開界限，將拓撲引起的放大與模型引起的放大區分開，並引入了一個聯合節點-邊緣運算符以進行動態邊緣展開。在分析的指導下，我們提出了錯誤感知 GWM，結合了譜正則化、展開一致性和關鍵節點加權。在合成拓撲和異質代理圖測試平台上，展開誤差和規劃後悔隨著時間增長而增長，當結構演變時需要動態邊緣訓練，而錯誤感知 GWM 在保持預測準確性的同時防止長期發散。現實世界的圖基準明確了 GWM 的範疇：它們對於動態圖展開和代理規劃最為有用，而專門的圖模型在靜態或稀疏預測任務上仍然表現出色。
2606.27780.author: Xinyuan Song et.al.
